name: Bank of America® Unlimited Cash Rewards Credit Card

welcome_offer.description: Earn a $200 cash rewards bonus after making at least $1,000 in purchases in the first 90 days of account opening. Earn unlimited 2% cash back on purchases for the first year.

earning_rates.notes: Unlimited 1.5% cash back on all purchases (2% first year). Rate boosted up to 2.62% with Preferred Rewards Gold/Platinum/Platinum Honors tiers.

other_benefits.name: Preferred Rewards Boost
other_benefits.description: 25%-75% bonus cash back via Preferred Rewards program (Gold/Platinum/Platinum Honors tiers)

other_benefits.name: Fraud Protection
other_benefits.description: Zero Liability protection for unauthorized transactions
